# Linting & Formatting Best Practices

> Proven patterns for code quality tooling, auto-formatting, and lint enforcement.

## Entries

- [Biome as Unified Linter and Formatter](biome-replacing-eslint.md): Single Rust-based tool replacing ESLint + Prettier for linting, formatting, and import sorting. RECOMMENDED.
- [Auto-Format on Write via PostToolUse Hook](auto-format-on-write-hook.md): Claude Code hook that auto-formats files after every edit or write. RECOMMENDED.
